label: Marquee Scroller
summary: CSS-driven horizontal marquee for logo strips, quote tickers, and 'as seen in' rows. Duplicates the children once so the loop is seamless, supports left/right direction + speed presets, pauses on hover, and freezes entirely when prefers-reduced-motion is set (the static row stays visible — the children are NEVER hidden). No JavaScript animation loop, no IntersectionObserver, no dependency — pure CSS keyframes for a smooth, GPU-accelerated infinite scroll.
notes: CSS-only; intentionally avoids framer-motion to keep the bundle small for sites that only need a logo strip. If the brief asks for parallax or scroll-driven reveal, use the parallax dossiers instead.
